security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
security.subtitle: Your account and data are protected by industry-leading security standards
security.encryptionDesc: All data encrypted in transit and at rest using industry standards
security.complianceDesc: Fully compliant with GDPR, CCPA, and Nigerian data protection laws
security.paymentsDesc: All payments processed through Flutterwave (PCI DSS Level 1 certified)
security.supportDesc: Real humans available to help with any questions or issues
security.guaranteeDesc: Not satisfied with your engagement within 30 days? Get a full refund. We're confident in our service because we know it works.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: No. We use only real people and real engagement. Your account stays safe and compliant with platform policies.
faq.q2: How fast will I see results?
faq.a2: Real users start engaging within 1-24 hours of order placement. You'll see follower growth within days.
faq.a3: Yes, 100% real. All users are verified Nigerians with active accounts. You can see their profiles.
faq.a4: We support Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, YouTube, Facebook, and website traffic. 30+ services total.
faq.a5: Yes. If unsatisfied within 30 days, we offer full refund with no questions asked.
faq.q6: Is there a contract or minimum?
faq.a6: No contracts, no minimums. Pay only for what you order. Cancel anytime.
